subcodes.first_line: O thou that dost serve at the divine Threshold! This service of thine is higher than the sovereignty of all the world.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم درگاه حق این خادمی تو از شهنشاهی عالم برتر است و این بندگی تو از
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
